title: UPI OC No 232 FY 2026 27 Classification of MCC for Gift Card Voucher Purchase Transactions
text:
Nell

ALWAYS
sonora nee reece ee | FORWIPRD

NPCI/UPVOC-232/2026-27 17% April 2026

To,
All Members — UPI and RuPay

Dear Sir/Madam,

Subject: Classification of MCC for Gift Card/ Voucher Purchase Transactions

Gift card/ voucher purchase transactions are currently classified under MCC 6540, which is also
used for PPI wallet loading, thereby creating challenges in differentiation and classification. To
enable distinct classification and clear bifurcation, transactions related to gift cards/vouchers
purchased through UP! shall be classified under new MCC 7016.

Acquiring banks/ PSPs shall ensure that merchants offering gift cards/vouchers are assigned
MCC 7016 within the applicable scope, including both existing and new merchants.

Acquiring banks/ PSPs are required to take note of the above and ensure compliance to the same
by 31%t May 2026.

Detailed controls and responsibilities of acquiring banks/ PSPs are covered under annexure.

Yours Sincerely,
SD/-

Sourabh Tomar
Head — UPI Product

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051.
